name: Lemon Afternoon Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl with mixer on medium speed, beat together cream cheese and Hellman's mayonnaise until smooth. Gradually add sugar, beating until well combined.
2. Beat in eggs one at a time, then stir in grated lemon rind, lemon juice (if using), and vanilla extract. Mix until all ingredients are thoroughly incorporated.
3. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie crust on a cookie sheet. Place in an oven preheated to 350°F.
4. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until set. Allow to chill for 4 hours before serving.
